query:
UPDATE orders 
SET teacherFee = CASE 
  WHEN channelOrderNo = '4200002901202601055351076736' THEN '210.00'
  WHEN channelOrderNo = '4200002915202512312083351883' THEN '200.00'
  ELSE teacherFee
END
WHERE channelOrderNo IN ('4200002901202601055351076736', '4200002915202512312083351883');
